rooms.name: Cozy Standard Room
rooms.description: A comfortable standard room perfect for solo travelers or couples. Features a queen-sized bed, work desk, and city view. The room comes with complimentary Wi-Fi, flat-screen TV, and a modern en-suite bathroom.

rooms.name: Deluxe Ocean View
rooms.description: Spacious deluxe room with stunning ocean views. Includes a king-sized bed, sitting area, and premium amenities. Wake up to breathtaking sunrises and enjoy the private balcony overlooking the sea.

rooms.name: Family Suite
rooms.description: Perfect for families, this suite offers two bedrooms, a living area, and kid-friendly amenities. The spacious layout ensures everyone has their own space while staying connected.

rooms.name: Presidential Suite
rooms.description: The ultimate luxury experience. Features panoramic views, private butler service, and exclusive amenities. This suite spans an entire floor and includes a private dining room, spa bathroom, and premium entertainment system.

rooms.name: Garden View Standard
rooms.description: A peaceful retreat with beautiful garden views. This room offers tranquility with modern comforts, including a comfortable queen bed and a private terrace overlooking our landscaped gardens.

rooms.name: Executive Deluxe
rooms.description: Designed for business travelers, this room features a dedicated workspace, high-speed internet, and premium business amenities. Includes access to the executive lounge and complimentary pressing service.
